document.description: Paper-like or print-layout object whose exact private category depends on visible text, tables, columns, addresses, medical fields, or financial/document layout.

card like.description: Small rectangular card object whose identity depends on card layout, plastic/card material, chip/logo, or contact-card design rather than full document reading.

health.description: Health-related object, package, wrapper, test device, or medicine container identified mainly by object shape, packaging, or product form.

tattoo sleeve.description: Wearable patterned sleeve or fabric object with tattoo-like printed design.

category_descriptions.bills or receipt: Rectangular paper with totals, item lines, prices, payment fields, receipt or bill formatting.
category_descriptions.bank statement: Financial statement with account, balance, transaction, deposit, withdrawal, bank logo, or statement-period cues.
category_descriptions.letters with address: Letter or envelope-like document with recipient or sender address block, salutation, formal paragraphs, or mailing layout.
category_descriptions.transcript: Academic record with course, grade, GPA, credit, semester, school, or transcript table layout.
category_descriptions.mortgage or investment report: Formal financial report with mortgage, loan, principal, interest, escrow, APR, portfolio, investment, or rate cues.
category_descriptions.medical record document: Medical chart or record with patient, diagnosis, treatment, clinic, hospital, lab, chart, physician, or multi-page medical layout.
category_descriptions.doctors prescription: Prescription form with Rx, medication, dosage, mg, refill, prescriber, pharmacy, or structured prescription fields.
category_descriptions.local newspaper: Newspaper page with headline, columns, section, byline, article blocks, puzzle, or newspaper masthead.
category_descriptions.credit or debit card: Rectangular plastic payment card with chip, bank network logo, card branding, or embossed/card-number layout.
category_descriptions.business card: Small rectangular contact card with name, title, company logo, phone, email, website, or contact layout.
category_descriptions.pregnancy test: Slim white plastic test device with result window, control/test line area, handle, or stick-like form.
category_descriptions.pregnancy test box: Retail box for pregnancy test with product branding, test-device illustration, count, or boxed packaging.
category_descriptions.condom box: Small retail cardboard condom box with commercial packaging design and small product text.
category_descriptions.condom with plastic bag: Small sealed transparent wrapper or plastic bag containing foil-wrapped condom-like item.
category_descriptions.empty pill bottle: Cylindrical plastic medicine bottle, often translucent or orange/white, usually with cap.
category_descriptions.tattoo sleeve: Colored sleeve or fabric with flame, tribal, tattoo-like, or patterned arm-cover design.
